settings.bannerbelow_heading: HOW A POUCH OF GOODNESS BECAME A LITTLE MOVEMENT OF LOVE
settings.bannerbelow_heading_text1:
We started Velvey with one small belief: the world could use more kindness, more often.

Not just for big moments like birthdays or weddings (though we love those too), but for the everyday wins,
the “thinking of you”s, and the quiet check-ins that make people feel loved and remembered. We wanted
to make it easy to say, “Hey, I see you”—with something small, meaningful, and uniquely you.

So, we created Velvey: A velvet pouch of goodness, if you will.

We’re not here to sell stuff. We’re here to help you connect. To help you celebrate your best friend’s 27th
birthday (for the third time), thank your ride-or-die coworker, or surprise your neighbor just for being
awesome. We’re here for the thoughtful ones, the gifters who don’t need a reason, the people who
believe small gestures can make someone’s entire week.

And because we’re gift-givers too, we’ve made it all:

  • Easy – just a few clicks.
  • Customizable – add your words, your vibe, your voice.
  • Affordable – because being thoughtful shouldn’t break the bank.


We like to think of ourselves as a team of givers, building this with heart, hustle, and a shared love of cute
packaging and unexpected kindness. When you choose to give with Velvey, you’re not just sending a gift—
you’re starting a ripple of connection, one pouch at a time.


We’re so glad you’re here. And we can’t wait to help you make someone’s day.
